# Expand token activations into expert-major storage

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_deepseek_manual.py; do not edit. -->

This mixture-of-experts translation keeps routing scores, indices, counts, and expert values in tile operations.

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Upstream module | [`tile_kernels/moe/expand_to_fused_kernel.py`](https://github.com/deepseek-ai/TileKernels/blob/36d9e45d38e204ebb87e6f6e833821eee0482fe5/tile_kernels/moe/expand_to_fused_kernel.py) |
| Pinned revision | `36d9e45d38e204ebb87e6f6e833821eee0482fe5` |
| C++ function | `expand_to_fused` |
| Verification | `source-validated` |
| Minimum thread fragment | 128 bytes |

## Core C++ kernel

```cpp title="expand_to_fused_pto.hpp" linenums="1"
void expand_to_fused(DType *x, std::int32_t *token_topk_to_pos,
                     std::int32_t *pos_to_expert, DType *expanded_x) {
    static_assert(NumTokens > 0 && Hidden > 0 && NumTopk > 0 && NumExpanded > 0, "dim must be positive");
    static_assert(TileW * static_cast<int>(sizeof(DType)) % 32 == 0, "TileW*dtype 须 32B 对齐");
    constexpr int kTiles = Hidden / TileW;
    using namespace pto;
    using gm_in  = global_tensor<DType, RowMajor<NumTokens, Hidden>>;
    using gm_out = global_tensor<DType, RowMajor<NumExpanded, Hidden>>;
    using tile_d = LocalTile< DType, 1, TileW, BLayout::RowMajor>;
    using it_in  = global_iterator<gm_in,  tile_d>;
    using it_out = global_iterator<gm_out, tile_d>;
    it_in in_iter(x); it_out out_iter(expanded_x);

    tile_d zero; TEXPANDS(zero, static_cast<DType>(0));
    for (int p = 0; p < NumExpanded; ++p) {
        if (pos_to_expert[p] < 0)
            for (int t = 0; t < kTiles; ++t) { auto g = out_iter(p, t); TSTORE(g, zero); }
    }

    for (int n = 0; n < NumTokens; ++n) {
        for (int t = 0; t < kTiles; ++t) {
            auto gin = in_iter(n, t);
            tile_d src; TLOAD(src, gin);
            for (int k = 0; k < NumTopk; ++k) {
                int pos = token_topk_to_pos[n * NumTopk + k];
                if (pos >= 0) { auto g = out_iter(pos, t); TSTORE(g, src); }
            }
        }
    }
}
```

## Algorithm walkthrough

Load a routing fragment, apply selection, counting, normalization, gather, or reduction stages, and store the fragment in token-major or expert-major order.

## Source-to-intrinsic mapping

[`TEXPANDS`](../../../intrinsics/texpands.md), [`TLOAD`](../../../intrinsics/tload.md), [`TSTORE`](../../../intrinsics/tstore.md)

Scalar C++ controls dimensions, loop bounds, and tile coordinates. Tensor
values remain in global tensor views and typed tiles throughout the data path.

## Block and thread partition

Blocks partition tokens or experts; threads own disjoint routing fragments of at least 128 bytes and derive their coordinates from execution identity.

## Memory and tile flow

Scores and indices are loaded into typed tiles, transformed through the routing pipeline, and committed through regular or indexed tile memory operations.

## Build and verification

Run the migration gate from the repository root:

```console
python3 scripts/verify_deepseek_migration.py
```

The verification label records the strongest completed gate. A
`source-validated` page is a valid API example even when compiler lowering
for one of its public intrinsics is not yet available.

## Complete translated source

??? code "expand_to_fused_pto.hpp"

    ```cpp title="expand_to_fused_pto.hpp" linenums="1"
    #ifndef SUPERNPU_EXPAND_TO_FUSED_PTO_HPP
    #define SUPERNPU_EXPAND_TO_FUSED_PTO_HPP
    #include <common/pto_tileop.hpp>
    #include <cstddef>
    #include <cstdint>

    namespace supernpu::tile_isa {

    template <typename DType, int NumTokens, int Hidden, int NumTopk,
              int NumExpanded, int TileW = 16>
    void expand_to_fused(DType *x, std::int32_t *token_topk_to_pos,
                         std::int32_t *pos_to_expert, DType *expanded_x) {
        static_assert(NumTokens > 0 && Hidden > 0 && NumTopk > 0 && NumExpanded > 0, "dim must be positive");
        static_assert(TileW * static_cast<int>(sizeof(DType)) % 32 == 0, "TileW*dtype 须 32B 对齐");
        constexpr int kTiles = Hidden / TileW;
        using namespace pto;
        using gm_in  = global_tensor<DType, RowMajor<NumTokens, Hidden>>;
        using gm_out = global_tensor<DType, RowMajor<NumExpanded, Hidden>>;
        using tile_d = LocalTile< DType, 1, TileW, BLayout::RowMajor>;
        using it_in  = global_iterator<gm_in,  tile_d>;
        using it_out = global_iterator<gm_out, tile_d>;
        it_in in_iter(x); it_out out_iter(expanded_x);

        tile_d zero; TEXPANDS(zero, static_cast<DType>(0));
        for (int p = 0; p < NumExpanded; ++p) {
            if (pos_to_expert[p] < 0)
                for (int t = 0; t < kTiles; ++t) { auto g = out_iter(p, t); TSTORE(g, zero); }
        }

        for (int n = 0; n < NumTokens; ++n) {
            for (int t = 0; t < kTiles; ++t) {
                auto gin = in_iter(n, t);
                tile_d src; TLOAD(src, gin);
                for (int k = 0; k < NumTopk; ++k) {
                    int pos = token_topk_to_pos[n * NumTopk + k];
                    if (pos >= 0) { auto g = out_iter(pos, t); TSTORE(g, src); }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    }
    #endif
    ```
